steps.title: Identify the key reversal
steps.content: The passage uses however to challenge an apparent distinction: both private and public libraries, despite seeming different, shared a core similarity—they were patronage extensions.

steps.title: Match the claim to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly states the passage's purpose: to assert an essential similarity between private and early public libraries. The other choices either focus on a peripheral detail (A), add a critical judgment the passage doesn't make (B), or claim the passage addresses the wrong time period (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
